strings.clearCacheTitle: 🚨 THE TOTAL CLEANUP: Warning! Initiating a 'Clear Cache' will burn your fingerprints and wipe your criminal record. All your custom mod-shop themes, your smuggled languages, and your high-score records will be incinerated by the FIB. You'll be back at the airport with nothing but a cheap shirt and $10. Do you want to start from Level 1?
